This posting is locked only for district employees, in order to apply, you need to provide a password and click "Submit".




Important Note: This password is NOT your EDJOIN password. This password must be provided by the HR department at the district you are applying to and cannot be provided by the EDJOIN Help Desk.

Verify Your Email Address

We recently updated the security of this site and all account emails must be verified to login. Click the button below to send a verification link to the email address () tied to your account.

Email Verification Link Sent

An Email Verification link was sent to the email address . The verification link will expire in 48 hours. Please click on the link in the email you received to continue and complete the verification process.

If you do not see the email in your inbox after approximately 10-15 minutes, check your SPAM/Junk email folder(s), thank you.

Elementary Teacher - 2nd Grade at Palo Alto Unified School District

Share on X
Application Deadline

Until Filled

Date Posted
6/3/2026
Contact
Jaime Anderson
Number of Openings
1
Salary
Pay dependent on experience
Add'l Salary Info
Placement on Teachers Salary
Length of Work Year
187 Days
Employment Type
Full Time
Location
Walter Hays Elementary
Department
Education Services
Benefits
100% Employee (self)

Job Summary

Job Summary

OVERVIEW: A teacher provides an educational program for students (Grade K-5); assists in other school programs as assigned; maintains control over the classroom; preserves suitable learning conditions; and evaluates student progress.

Requirements / Qualifications

  • Copy of Transcript (This is a Required Document )
  • Credential Copy (This is a Required Document )
  • Letter of Introduction (This is a Required Document )
  • Letter(s) of Recommendation (This is a Required Document (minimum 2))
  • Resume (This is a Required Document )

Requirements / Qualifications

  • Copy of Transcript (This is a Required Document )
  • Credential Copy (This is a Required Document )
  • Letter of Introduction (This is a Required Document )
  • Letter(s) of Recommendation (This is a Required Document (minimum 2))
  • Resume (This is a Required Document )
